_fixture_meta.description: PASS scenario for G-DEP-03 Transparency Docs Present (R007)
_fixture_meta.expected_result: PASS — all transparency fields complete per Art. 13 + Art. 50
_fixture_meta.scenario: Healthcare Ambient AI Scribe — full transparency documentation

transparency.instructions_for_deployers: The Ambient AI Scribe must be deployed in clinical environments with trained medical staff present. Output summaries must be reviewed by a licensed physician before inclusion in patient records. System operates as decision-support only — not autonomous diagnosis.
transparency.model_capabilities: Real-time transcription of patient-physician consultations with automated SOAP note generation. Supports English and German. Optimized for outpatient primary care settings.
known_limitations: Accuracy degrades significantly in multi-speaker environments with more than 3 participants
Medical terminology coverage limited to primary care — specialist jargon (oncology, cardiology) may produce errors
No support for dialects or heavy accents in current model version
Latency increases above 3s for consultations exceeding 45 minutes
